recipe.title: Peanut Chicken Bowls
steps: Cook jasmine rice according to package directions, about 15-20 minutes.
Heat sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add ground chicken and cook, breaking apart, until browned and cooked through, about 6-8 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger. Stir and cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Add bell peppers and carrots. Stir-fry 3-4 minutes until slightly tender.
Add broccoli and cook 3 more minutes until vegetables are crisp-tender.
Pour peanut sauce over chicken and vegetables. Toss to coat evenly and heat through, about 2 minutes.
Divide rice among bowls. Top with sauced chicken mixture. Sprinkle with peanuts and serve immediately.
